zh.lifeSummary: 當Helen Abernethy於大約1478年出生在英國蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾武坡 堂 本 薩爾圖時，她的父親James Abernethy 3rd Lord Saltoun of Abernethy25歲，母親Margaret Isabella Bethia Wylie Forbes21歲。她於1495年與Thomas Urquhart of Fischerie, Sheriff of Cromarty在英國蘇格蘭羅斯 安德 可洛馬迪可洛馬迪結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1557年在英國蘇格蘭羅斯 安德 可洛馬迪可洛馬迪享年80歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭羅斯 安德 可洛馬迪可洛馬迪。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Helen Abernethy于大约1478年出生在英国苏格兰哈丁頓史爾武坡 堂 本 薩爾圖时，她的父亲James Abernethy 3rd Lord Saltoun of Abernethy25岁，母亲Margaret Isabella Bethia Wylie Forbes21岁。她于1495年与Thomas Urquhart of Fischerie, Sheriff of Cromarty在英国苏格兰羅斯 安德 可洛馬迪可洛馬迪结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1557年在英国苏格兰羅斯 安德 可洛馬迪可洛馬迪享年80岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰羅斯 安德 可洛馬迪可洛馬迪。

nameMeanings.name: Abernethy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Abernathy
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Abernethy in southeastern Perthshire. The placename is of Pictish origin, meaning ‘mouth of the river Nethy’.

History: This was the name of a cadet branch of MacDuff earls of Fife and one of the surnames of the Scots who settled in northern Ireland during the ‘plantation’ in the 17th century, and it was brought to the US as the name of a Southern plantation owner (in a different sense of the word ‘plantation’).

nameMeanings.name: Helen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of the name (Greek Hēlēnē) borne in classical legend by a famous beauty, wife of Menelaus, whose seizure by the Trojan prince Paris sparked off the Trojan War. Her name is of uncertain origin; it may be connected with a word meaning ‘ray’ or ‘sunbeam’ compare Greek hēlios ‘sun’. It has sometimes been taken as connected with the Greek word meaning ‘Greek’, Hellēn, but this is doubtful. In the early Christian period the name was borne by the mother of the Emperor Constantine, who is now usually known by the Latin version of her name, Helena. She is credited with having found the True Cross in Jerusalem. She was born in about 248 , probably in Bithynia. However, in medieval England it was believed that she had been born in Britain, which greatly increased the popularity of the name there.

en.lifeSummary: When Helen Abernethy was born about 1478, in Upper Town of Saltoun, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, James Abernethy 3rd Lord Saltoun of Abernethy, was 25 and her mother, Margaret Isabella Bethia Wylie Forbes, was 21. She married Thomas Urquhart of Fischerie, Sheriff of Cromarty in 1495, in Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1557, in Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 80, and was buried in Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Helen Abernethy est née environ 1478, à Upper Town of Saltoun, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, James Abernethy 3rd Lord Saltoun of Abernethy, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret Isabella Bethia Wylie Forbes, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Urquhart of Fischerie, Sheriff of Cromarty en 1495, à Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1557, à Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterrée à Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Helen Abernethy um 1478 in Upper Town of Saltoun, Haddingtonshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James Abernethy 3rd Lord Saltoun of Abernethy 25 und ihre Mutter Margaret Isabella Bethia Wylie Forbes 21. Sie hat 1495 in Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Schottland, United Kingdom Thomas Urquhart of Fischerie, Sheriff of Cromarty geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1557 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Helen Abernethy è nata il circa 1478 nel Upper Town of Saltoun, Haddingtonshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, James Abernethy 3rd Lord Saltoun of Abernethy, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Margaret Isabella Bethia Wylie Forbes, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Urquhart of Fischerie, Sheriff of Cromarty nel 1495, nel Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1557, nel Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolta a Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Helen Abernethyが約1478年にイギリススコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアウップエル トウン オフ サルトウンで生まれた時，父James Abernethy 3rd Lord Saltoun of Abernethyは25歳，母Margaret Isabella Bethia Wylie Forbesは21歳であった。1495年にイギリススコットランドロス アンド クロマルトイクロマルトイでThomas Urquhart of Fischerie, Sheriff of Cromartyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1557年にイギリススコットランドロス アンド クロマルトイクロマルトイで80歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドロス アンド クロマルトイクロマルトイにて埋葬された。

ko.Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 로스 앤드 크로마티 크로마티
ko.lifeSummary: Helen Abernethy(이)가 대략 1478년 영국 스코틀랜드 하딩토실르 업퍼 타운 프 살토우에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Abernethy 3rd Lord Saltoun of Abernethy(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Isabella Bethia Wylie Forbes(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1495년 영국 스코틀랜드 로스 앤드 크로마티 크로마티에서 Thomas Urquhart of Fischerie, Sheriff of Cromarty(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1557년 영국 스코틀랜드 로스 앤드 크로마티 크로마티에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 로스 앤드 크로마티 크로마티에 묻혔다.

pt.Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland: Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Escócia, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Helen Abernethy nasceu aproximadamente 1478, em Upper Town of Saltoun, Haddingtonshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, James Abernethy 3rd Lord Saltoun of Abernethy, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Isabella Bethia Wylie Forbes, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Urquhart of Fischerie, Sheriff of Cromarty em 1495, em Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1557, em Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 80 anos, e foi sepultada em Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Saltoun,West Haddington,East Lothian,Sco: уппир тоун оф салтоун, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.Saltoun, East Lothian, Scotland: уппир тоун оф салтоун, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland: кромерти, росс анд кромерти, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Helen Abernethy родилась около 1478 г. в местности уппир тоун оф салтоун, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени James Abernethy 3rd Lord Saltoun of Abernethy было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Isabella Bethia Wylie Forbes, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Urquhart of Fischerie, Sheriff of Cromarty в 1495 г. в местности кромерти, росс анд кромерти, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1557 г. в местности кромерти, росс анд кромерти, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет и была похоронена в местности кромерти, росс анд кромерти, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Helen Abernethy nació aproximadamente 1478, en Upper Town of Saltoun, Haddingtonshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, James Abernethy 3rd Lord Saltoun of Abernethy, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Margaret Isabella Bethia Wylie Forbes, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Thomas Urquhart of Fischerie, Sheriff of Cromarty en 1495, en Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1557, en Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultada en Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Escocia, Reino Unido.
